summary: Clarified OpenCode memory behavior: compact is session compaction, while durable learning requires session resume plus AI-QA-LAB memory, runtime handoff, and learning-ledger updates.
derived_updates: Added OPENCODE_MEMORY_GUIDE.md with the project-local start, continue, list, export, and import workflow.
Corrected Engineer and skill references from 01-runtime/runtime/*.md to 01-runtime/runtime/docs/*.md so new runs can read runtime handoff files reliably.
Verified current OpenCode SQLite storage is project-local and currently has zero sessions, zero messages, and zero todos after the reset.
